ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the country's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country from which data is collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection period */,
  "pre_date" TEXT /* Date before the current period for comparison */,
  "end_truth" INTEGER /* Confirmed cases at the end of the period */,
  "pre_cases" INTEGER /* Confirmed cases from the previous period */,
  "ncnrpe" REAL /* Percentage change in cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., governmental, NGO, private) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health metric used for the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings presented in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed, trend) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user for security and auditing */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for device and browser information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health metric associated with the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend observed */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* A score indicating the impact of the trend */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response action */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country taking the action */,
  "response_action" TEXT /* Description of the response action taken */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response action was implemented */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., policy, action) */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* A score indicating the impact of the response */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for the response action */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
